# Conductor N(E) and root number ε(E) for the height-ordered family
#   {E_{A,B}: y²=x³+Ax+B, H(E)=max(4|A|³,27B²) ≤ X, reduced, nonsingular}.
# N, eps are OBTAINED FROM AN ORACLE (PARI/GP) — a live oracle supplying
# trusted INPUT, not refereeing our numbers; a_p stays COMPUTED (ap_charsum).
# Residual risk: a systematic oracle N/ε error propagates silently — certified
# against pinned ecdata by verify/m4/oracle_dual_overlap_NE (5676 classes exact).
# Generated by: `at ne-cache --X 10000 --out data/m4/ne_cache.txt`.
